tools.firstSentence: Spec 032: start a build run for a pipeline.

tools.name: start_re_workflow
tools.firstSentence: Spec 046: pick a workflow template (full-re | cracker-only | analyst-deep | targeted-routine | bugfix).

tools.name: suggest_depacker
tools.firstSentence: Probe a file or a sliced subrange and suggest likely depackers such as RLE, Exomizer raw, or ByteBoozer-like wrappers.

tools.name: suggest_disk_lut_sector
tools.firstSentence: Heuristic scan: look at every sector for plausible fixed-stride LUT entry tables and rank by confidence.

tools.name: trace_store_anchor_find
tools.firstSentence: List occurrences of a single anchor by name.

tools.name: trace_store_anchor_list
tools.firstSentence: List all anchors in a trace store with occurrence counts and clock range.

tools.name: trace_store_bus_find
tools.firstSentence: List bus_events at a target address (read+write+RMW).

tools.name: trace_store_info
tools.firstSentence: Summarize a trace-store: meta, table counts, master_clock range.

tools.name: trace_store_query
tools.firstSentence: Run a read-only SELECT/WITH SQL query against the trace store.

tools.name: trace_store_top_pcs
tools.firstSentence: Return the top-N most-frequent PCs for a given CPU side (c64 | drive8).

tools.name: try_depack
tools.firstSentence: Try a specific depacker against a file or sliced subrange.

tools.name: update_task_status
tools.firstSentence: Update the status of an existing task in the knowledge layer.

tools.name: verify_constraints
tools.firstSentence: Spec 029: run the built-in constraint checker.

tools.name: vice_debug_run
tools.firstSentence: Set execution breakpoints in the active VICE session, continue execution, and return when a breakpoint, stop, or JAM event occurs.

tools.name: vice_monitor_backtrace
tools.firstSentence: Build a heuristic call stack from the 6502 stack page in the active VICE session.

tools.name: vice_monitor_bank
tools.firstSentence: List the available VICE memory banks for the active machine.

tools.name: vice_monitor_binary_save
tools.firstSentence: Save a memory range from the active VICE session as a raw binary file without a load-address header.

tools.name: vice_monitor_breakpoint_add
tools.firstSentence: Add a breakpoint/watchpoint/tracepoint in the active VICE session.

tools.name: vice_monitor_breakpoint_delete
tools.firstSentence: Delete a checkpoint from the active VICE session.

tools.name: vice_monitor_breakpoint_list
tools.firstSentence: List checkpoints currently configured in the active VICE session.

tools.name: vice_monitor_continue
tools.firstSentence: Resume execution in the active VICE session until the next breakpoint or manual stop.

tools.name: vice_monitor_display
tools.firstSentence: Capture the current VICE display buffer and save it as an 8-bit grayscale PGM preview plus JSON metadata.

tools.name: vice_monitor_memory
tools.firstSentence: Read a memory range from the active VICE session.

tools.name: vice_monitor_next
tools.firstSentence: Advance the active VICE session by one instruction, stepping over subroutine calls.

tools.name: vice_monitor_registers
tools.firstSentence: Read CPU register values from the active VICE session.

tools.name: vice_monitor_reset
tools.firstSentence: Reset the active VICE machine or one of its drives.

tools.name: vice_monitor_save
tools.firstSentence: Save a memory range from the active VICE session as a PRG file with a load-address header.

tools.name: vice_monitor_set_registers
tools.firstSentence: Set CPU register values in the active VICE session.

tools.name: vice_monitor_snapshot
tools.firstSentence: Save a VICE snapshot (.vsf) from the active session.

tools.name: vice_monitor_step
tools.firstSentence: Advance the active VICE session by one instruction and stop again.

tools.name: vice_monitor_write_memory
tools.firstSentence: Write bytes into the active VICE session memory.

tools.name: vice_session_attach_media
tools.firstSentence: Autostart or autoload media into an already running VICE session via the binary monitor.

tools.name: vice_session_joystick
tools.firstSentence: Send keyset-based joystick input into the active visible VICE session.

tools.name: vice_session_send_keys
tools.firstSentence: Feed text, PETSCII bytes, or named special keys into the active VICE keyboard buffer.

tools.name: vice_session_start
tools.firstSentence: Start a visible x64sc VICE session using a copied user config.

tools.name: vice_session_status
tools.firstSentence: Report the current or most recent VICE session state, including workspace paths and monitor-port readiness.

tools.name: vice_session_stop
tools.firstSentence: Stop the active VICE session.

tools.name: vice_trace_add_note
tools.firstSentence: Append a reasoning note/bookmark to a completed VICE trace session so investigation can proceed step by step without losing findings.

tools.name: vice_trace_analyze_last_session
tools.firstSentence: Analyze the most recently completed VICE runtime-trace session.

tools.name: vice_trace_build_context_index
tools.firstSentence: Build a persistent interrupt/context index for the VICE runtime trace so IRQ/NMI-like execution paths can be isolated without scanning the full raw trace every

tools.name: vice_trace_build_index
tools.firstSentence: Build a persistent search index for a completed runtime trace, including continuity metrics and optional semantic links from an annotations JSON.

tools.name: vice_trace_build_pyramid_index
tools.firstSentence: Build a persistent semantic zoom index over the raw VICE runtime trace, including multi-scale windows, aggregate routine/segment/address summaries, and phase de

tools.name: vice_trace_call_path
tools.firstSentence: Heuristically reconstruct the JSR caller chain leading to an anchor clock in a completed runtime trace.

tools.name: vice_trace_context_writes
tools.firstSentence: Show the dominant memory writes and call edges recorded for one indexed interrupt context.

tools.name: vice_trace_find_bytes
tools.firstSentence: Find instructions in a completed VICE runtime trace by raw byte pattern.

tools.name: vice_trace_find_memory_access
tools.firstSentence: Find direct memory accesses to a specific address in a completed VICE runtime trace, classified as read, write, or readwrite when possible.

tools.name: vice_trace_find_operand
tools.firstSentence: Find instructions in a completed VICE runtime trace whose raw instruction bytes contain a target operand address.

tools.name: vice_trace_find_pc
tools.firstSentence: Find occurrences of a specific PC in a completed VICE runtime trace.

tools.name: vice_trace_find_phase_changes
tools.firstSentence: List the strongest phase boundaries detected from the trace window feature vectors.

tools.name: vice_trace_follow_from_pc
tools.firstSentence: Follow the concrete linear execution path after entering a given PC in the completed runtime trace.

tools.name: vice_trace_hotspots
tools.firstSentence: Summarize the hottest PCs in a completed VICE runtime trace.

tools.name: vice_trace_list_contexts
tools.firstSentence: List indexed IRQ/NMI/interrupt contexts so you can isolate a handler execution path before opening raw trace slices.

tools.name: vice_trace_list_notes
tools.firstSentence: List saved reasoning notes/bookmarks for a completed VICE trace session.

tools.name: vice_trace_runtime_start
tools.firstSentence: Start a visible VICE session with periodic CPU-history sampling.

tools.name: vice_trace_slice
tools.firstSentence: Return a focused instruction window around an anchor clock from a completed VICE runtime trace.

tools.name: vice_trace_slice_context
tools.firstSentence: Return the raw instruction slice for one indexed interrupt context, with optional padding before and after the context span.

tools.name: vice_trace_start
tools.firstSentence: Enable periodic CPU-history sampling on the active VICE session without restarting the emulator.

tools.name: vice_trace_status
tools.firstSentence: Report whether runtime tracing is currently active on the active VICE session.

tools.name: vice_trace_stop
tools.firstSentence: Stop periodic CPU-history sampling on the active VICE session without closing VICE.

tools.name: vice_trace_stop_and_analyze
tools.firstSentence: Capture a final register snapshot plus CPU history from the active VICE session, stop the session, write trace artifacts, and return a compact analysis summary.

tools.name: vice_trace_zoom_overview
tools.firstSentence: Summarize the multi-scale trace pyramid so you can zoom out to the dominant windows and detected execution phases before opening raw slices.

tools.name: vice_trace_zoom_window
tools.firstSentence: Inspect one window from the trace pyramid, or drill into all base windows that belong to a detected phase.
